data.title: Review sub-agent runs compute-diff-hash.sh from orchestrator CWD instead of worktree REPO_ROOT during per-worktree review
data.description:
## Bug Report

### Observed Behavior
During per-worktree serial review (Phase 5 of /dso:sprint with worktree.isolation_enabled=true), the review sub-agent dispatched via dso:code-reviewer-standard ran compute-diff-hash.sh from the orchestrator's working directory instead of the worktree's REPO_ROOT. This caused a diff hash mismatch:
- Diff file hash: 313a3101 (captured correctly in the worktree context)
- Current hash computed by reviewer: e3b0c442 (SHA256 of empty string — no staged changes in orchestrator CWD)

The reviewer returned REVIEW_RESULT: error and did not produce findings.

### Expected Behavior
The review sub-agent should compute the diff hash from the same git context where the diff was captured (the worktree's REPO_ROOT), producing a matching hash and proceeding with the review.

### Root Cause Analysis
Two instructions conflict:
1. per-worktree-review-commit.md Step 2: "Dispatch review sub-agent in worktree cwd"
2. REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md Step 4: "NEVER set isolation: worktree on this sub-agent"

When the orchestrator dispatches the review agent without isolation:worktree, the agent starts in the orchestrator's CWD (the session branch worktree). It receives REPO_ROOT pointing to the implementation worktree, but compute-diff-hash.sh runs against the git state of the agent's actual CWD — which is the orchestrator's directory with no staged changes.

### Reproduction Context
- Sprint epic: 9b59-bac7
- Implementation worktree: /Users/joeoakhart/digital-service-orchestra/.claude/worktrees/agent-a180a70c (branch: worktree-agent-a180a70c)
- Orchestrator worktree: /Users/joeoakhart/digital-service-orchestra-worktrees/worktree-20260411-092746
- ARTIFACTS_DIR: /tmp/workflow-plugin-cbe6ec7c7912612e
- DIFF_FILE: /tmp/workflow-plugin-cbe6ec7c7912612e/review-diff-313a3101.txt
- Files changed in worktree: .test-index (1 line), tests/hooks/test-run-overlay-retrospective-path.sh (50 lines, new file)
- Review agent type: dso:code-reviewer-standard (sonnet)
- Reviewer made no file changes — returned error immediately

### Potential Fix Directions
1. Add explicit "cd $REPO_ROOT" instruction at the top of the review sub-agent prompt so compute-diff-hash.sh runs in the correct git context
2. Update REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md to allow worktree isolation for review agents when dispatched during per-worktree review (would require reviewer-findings.json to be written to the worktree's ARTIFACTS_DIR)
3. Have the orchestrator pass a pre-computed diff hash to the reviewer to skip the hash verification step during per-worktree review
